text:
やっぱ気になるだろ？
おたくとは付き合い長いから
そういうのピンと来るんだ。

ま、オレがちゃちゃっと倒しても
よかったんだけどさ。
それじゃ、おたくもつまんねーだろ？

花を持たせてやりてーというか
見せ場、作らせてやりてーし。
オレはいつもどおりモニターで見てる。

あ、そうそう！
１体だけじゃなくて、５、６０体くらい
ウジャウジャいるからヨロシクな

That request caught your eye, ya? I know you
well enough to tell that much, pal.

I mean, I could've gone out there and cleaned
up shop myself, of course. But I wouldn't
wanna steal all the fun, right?

I figure I gotta leave something for you to do.
Some place to let you strut your stuff and all.
Me? I'll keep an eye from my monitor here.

Ah, yeah, before you go! Remember, we're not
talking just one, but a real swarm of like
fifty or sixty or so! Good luck!
